steps.memory:
Brian Kernighan 저자의 도서 목록은 다음과 같습니다:
1. Software tools in Pascal
2. Millions, billions, zillions : defending yourself in a world of too many numbers [electronic resource]
3. Kernighan 의) C 언어 프로그래밍
4. The C programming language
